id: Primary Key UUID of this specific item Instance record
characterId: Foreign Key UUID of the character that this inventory item belongs to
type: String of type of item, limited to Array of ['artifact', 'curio', 'gear', 'weapon', 'armor']
isEquipped: Boolean if weapon or armor is currently equipped
baseItem: ID of specific item to pull properties from
displayName: String default to name of baseItem name, can be overwritten with custom name
dmgOverride: String of dice damage value to override baseItem damage defaults to baseItem damage
descriptionOverride: String of description value to override baseItem description defaults to baseItem description
slotOverride: Positive INT of number of inventory slots item takes up, defaults to baseItem slots
stackValue: If baseItem has a stack value, Number of items currently in the stack, defaults to max value of stack of baseItem
specialOverride: String, if baseItem has special rules, defaults to baseItem special rules
